subject: taking a break
body:
Hi all,

I’m about to take an extended break from work so won’t be responding to any messages about warp/tomography/subtomogram averaging.

Apologies if you’ve been left hanging recently, I know I’ve not been on top of the mailing list/github issues.

Tomography is still tough, please be generous with your knowledge if you see someone asking for help.

Take care and happy processing,

Alister

Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
